title: Swiggy Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Swiggy Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Swiggy Logistics! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Swiggy Logistics:
Swiggy Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Logistics!
